ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., Dependency Property) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., Bool, Rect, Effect, Brush) */,
  "reference_links" TEXT /* Reference links to additional documentation or resources */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the property is required */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the property is read-only */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the property for better organization */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the property */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES property_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_system_type" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the property type is predefined by the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the property type */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_types_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_system_type" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the data type is predefined by the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data type */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "gui_element_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gui_elements table */,
  "value" TEXT /* The actual value of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was set */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_gui_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("gui_element_id") REFERENCES gui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gui_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GUI element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the GUI element */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the GUI element (e.g., diagram, window, control) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the GUI element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GUI element was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the GUI element */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GUI element was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gui_elements_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gui_elements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
